title: rubus glandulorudis
intro: Rubus glandulorudis, also known as the glandular dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus glandulorudis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
